sections.title: Foundational papers
sections.blurb: The primary sources behind modern LLMs and retrieval-augmented systems.

items.name: Attention Is All You Need (Transformer)
items.author: Vaswani et al., 2017
items.note: The architecture every modern LLM is built on.

items.name: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks
items.author: Lewis et al., 2020

items.name: Dense Passage Retrieval (DPR)
items.author: Karpukhin et al., 2020
items.note: Embedding-based retrieval that powers modern RAG.

items.name: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models
items.author: Yao et al., 2022
items.note: The reason+act loop behind tool-using agents.

items.name: Toolformer: Language Models Can Teach Themselves to Use Tools
items.author: Schick et al., 2023
items.note: Models learning when and how to call tools.

items.name: Self-RAG: Learning to Retrieve, Generate, and Critique
items.author: Asai et al., 2023
items.note: Self-reflective retrieval — the idea behind Agentic RAG.

sections.title: Guides & documentation
sections.blurb: Practical, well-maintained references you'll come back to.

items.name: Prompt Engineering Guide (DAIR.AI)
items.author: DAIR.AI
items.note: Comprehensive open guide to prompting techniques.

items.name: LangChain — RAG concepts
items.author: LangChain
items.note: How retrieval pipelines are structured in practice.

items.name: LlamaIndex — Agentic RAG
items.author: LlamaIndex
items.note: Routing, query rewriting and tool-using retrieval.

items.name: Hugging Face — Transformers course
items.author: Hugging Face
items.note: Free, hands-on intro to the model stack.

items.name: Anthropic — Building effective agents
items.author: Anthropic
items.note: When to use workflows vs. agents, with patterns.

sections.title: Articles & tutorials
sections.blurb: Approachable deep-dives and Medium-style write-ups to supplement each project.

items.name: A Visual Guide to Vector Embeddings
items.author: Medium / Towards Data Science
items.note: Build intuition for embeddings and similarity.

items.name: Multi-Agent LLM systems: patterns
items.author: Medium
items.note: Curated tag of multi-agent architecture write-ups.

items.name: The Illustrated Transformer
items.author: Jay Alammar
items.note: The clearest visual explanation of attention.

items.name: Patterns for Building LLM-based Systems & Products
items.author: Eugene Yan
items.note: Evaluation, RAG, caching and guardrails in production.
